event: View of Rouen with river, bridge, and industrial chimney
description: An impressionist cityscape showing a view across a wide river toward the city of Rouen. A stone bridge crosses the river at the left. Several flat-bottomed barges and boats sit on the calm water. A tall industrial chimney emits smoke on the left bank. The city's buildings, including churches and houses, line the far bank. The sky is filled with soft clouds in pale blue and cream tones. The overall palette is muted with warm grays, blues, and touches of ochre, rendered in the loose brushwork characteristic of Pissarro's impressionist style.
